mapper.select: SELECT * FROM outfit_advice_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND NOT (input_type = 3 AND occasion = 'HOME_DAILY') ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM outfit_advice_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND occasion = #{occasion} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM outfit_advice_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_favorite = true AND NOT (input_type = 3 AND occasion = 'HOME_DAILY') ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM outfit_advice_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND input_type = 3 AND occasion = 'HOME_DAILY' AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM outfit_advice_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND input_type = 3 AND occasion = 'HOME_DAILY'
